    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "Your global config now includes **&#96;credential.helper = store&#96;**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "## What you need to do (I can’t enter your PAT here)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "Run push **yourself** in a normal terminal (from the repo):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "cd /home/tusharsaini/CursorAI-training"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "git push origin main"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "When Git asks for credentials:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "- **Username:** your **GitHub username** (not email)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "- **Password:** paste the **new Personal Access Token** (not your GitHub account password)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "After one successful push, the helper will store the pair; later pushes should not ask again."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "**Token checks on GitHub:** scope **&#96;repo&#96;** (and for org repos with SSO, **authorize the token** for that org if required)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "**Files changed:** only your **global** Git config at &#96;~/.gitconfig&#96; (added &#96;credential.helper = store&#96;). No project files were modified."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "If push still returns 401, say whether the repo is under an **organization with SSO** and we can narrow it down (e.g. &#96;gh auth login&#96; vs HTTPS)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "_**User**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "share me the commands to setup the user name and password"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "**Explaining Git config**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "I'm clarifying that Git username/email are commit identities, not auth credentials, and PATs shouldn't be stored in git config. I'm documenting safe Git credential management practices and standard commands for setting user identity. I'm documenting secure Git credential storage using credential helpers instead of exposing tokens in chat. \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "Here are the usual commands and how they relate to GitHub."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "## Commit identity (name and email)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "These are **not** your GitHub login; they only label your commits."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "**Global (all repos on this machine):**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "git config --global user.name \"Your Full Name\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "git config --global user.email \"your.email@company.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "**Only this repo:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "cd /path/to/your/repo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "git config user.name \"Your Full Name\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "git config user.email \"your.email@company.com\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "**Check what is set:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "git config --global --get user.name"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 345
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 278
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- Add types for navigation params, API responses, and state."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "## Policies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "- **Secrets:** Never commit &#96;.env&#96;. Copy &#96;.env.example&#96; to &#96;.env&#96; locally. Never hardcode keys in source — see **Strict prohibitions**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "## Navigation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "- For Navigation, Use React Navigation v6 - Bottom Tab + Stack"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "- No use of any navigation library other than React Navigation v6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "- Navigation types must be defined in src/navigation/types.ts and used everywhere."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "## State Management"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "- Use Zustand"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "- No use of Redux, MobX, or any state library other than Zustand"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "## Styling "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- Use StyleSheet.create() only - No third-party UI libraries"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "- No use of NativeWind, Styled Components, or any CSS-in-JS library"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "- Pre-built UI component libraries only (no React Native Paper, Elements, etc.)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "- Use on_surface_variant for all secondary metadata"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "- Allow asymmetry — the hero card on Home occupies significantly more width than regular cards"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "- No hardcoded hex strings in component files. Use the file - &#96;src/theme/colors.ts&#96; for fetching color values"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "- No hardcoded pixel values in StyleSheet. Use the file - &#96;src/theme/spacing.ts&#96; for fetching spacing values "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "- Use surface_bright (#3A3939) for pressed/active states on dark cards"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "- Do not use pure white (#FFFFFF) for any text"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "- Do not use a 1px solid border at full opacity anywhere"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "- Do not use dividers between list or carousel items"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "- Do not use hardcode any hex colour outside src/theme/colors.ts"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "## Font"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "- Use Fonts - Manrope + Inter (via react-native-google-fonts)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "## Error handling"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "- Use &#96;try&#96; / &#96;catch&#96; for async code."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- Provide clear errors in UI (defaults or modals); never fail silently."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 85
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },

      "score": 0.17291170358657837

            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": ".DS_Store"
          },

            "text": "# Xcode"

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "!default.mode1v3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "# Android/IntelliJ"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "#"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "build/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": ".kotlin/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "# Environment (never commit secrets)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": ".env"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "# node.js"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "#"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "node_modules/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "npm-debug.log"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "yarn-error.log"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "# fastlane"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "#"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "# It is recommended to not store the screenshots in the git repo. Instead, use fastlane to re-generate the"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "# screenshots whenever they are needed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "# For more information about the recommended setup visit:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "# https://docs.fastlane.tools/best-practices/source-control/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "**/fastlane/report.xml"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "**/fastlane/Preview.html"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "**/fastlane/screenshots"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "**/fastlane/test_output"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "# Bundle artifact"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "*.jsbundle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "# Ruby / CocoaPods"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "**/Pods/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "/vendor/bundle/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "# Temporary files created by Metro to check the health of the file watcher"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": ".metro-health-check*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "# testing"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "/coverage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "# Yarn"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": ".yarn/*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "!.yarn/patches"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,

          },
          {

          }
        ],

      "score": 0.16975979506969452
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com': No such device or address"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"shell\" data-tool-name=\"run_terminal_command_v2\"\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **run_terminal_command_v2**\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"shell\" data-tool-name=\"run_terminal_command_v2\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: grep -E '^credential|^\t' ~/.gitconfig 2\u003e/dev/null || cat ~/.gitconfig\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "grep -E '^credential|^\t' ~/.gitconfig 2\u003e/dev/null || cat ~/.gitconfig"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "\temail = tushar.saini@tothenew.com"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "\tname = tushar.saini"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\thelper = store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"shell\" data-tool-name=\"run_terminal_command_v2\"\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **run_terminal_command_v2**\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "**Guiding user through Git setup**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "I'm providing clear instructions for the user to complete the Git authentication setup with a PAT. \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "Here’s what was wrong and what was changed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "## What was wrong"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "Your **global** Git config only had &#96;user.name&#96; and &#96;user.email&#96;. There was **no &#96;credential.helper&#96;**, so Git relied on whatever Cursor’s askpass used before. After the **PAT expired**, that flow kept failing with **401**. Creating a new token on GitHub doesn’t help until Git **stops using the old secret** and **stores or asks for the new one**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "## What I ran"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "1. **&#96;git credential reject&#96;** for &#96;https://github.com&#96; — asks Git to drop any cached HTTPS credentials for GitHub (harmless if nothing was cached)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "2. **&#96;git config --global credential.helper store&#96;** — after the **next successful** HTTPS auth, Git will save the username/token in **&#96;~/.git-credentials&#96;** so you are not prompted every time."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "Your global config now includes **&#96;credential.helper = store&#96;**."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 281
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 213
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-04-14_05-03-57Z-code-push-authentication-issue.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.161135733127594
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "## What the error means"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "- **&#96;401&#96; + &#96;No anonymous write access&#96;** means Git reached GitHub over **HTTPS** but **did not send credentials GitHub accepts** (or sent ones that are **invalid/expired**).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "- Your **&#96;user.name&#96; / &#96;user.email&#96;** in &#96;git config&#96; only label commits; they **do not log you in**. Push auth is separate (token, SSH key, or credential helper)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "So the problem is **Git ↔ GitHub authentication**, not something wrong with your repo folder layout or branch names from what you pasted."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "## Why it could work yesterday and fail today"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "Common causes:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "1. **HTTPS + password** — GitHub **no longer accepts account passwords** for Git over HTTPS. You must use a [**Personal Access Token (PAT)**](https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/managing-your-personal-access-tokens) (or SSH). If something was cached and is now wrong/expired, you get 401."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "2. **Expired or revoked token** — PATs can expire; orgs can revoke them; rotating secrets clears old access."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "3. **Credential storage changed** — Linux keyring, &#96;git-credential-*&#96;, or **Cursor/VS Code’s Git** integration may have **lost or not prompted** for creds. Your stack trace points at Cursor’s **&#96;askpass-main.js&#96;**, which is the helper that supplies a username/password when Git asks; if that path fails or sends bad data, you see **401**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "4. **Org / SSO** — If the repo is under an org with SAML SSO, the token may need **SSO authorization** for that org (GitHub shows this in token settings)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "## What to check (conceptually)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "- Confirm remote is HTTPS (you did):  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  &#96;origin  https://github.com/ToTheN/CursorAI-training.git&#96; — pushes need a **valid PAT** (or switch remote to **SSH**)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "- In GitHub: **Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens** — ensure a token exists, **&#96;repo&#96;** scope (for private repos), not expired, and **SSO authorized** if required."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- After updating the token, **clear the old cached password** for &#96;github.com&#96; in your OS/credential helper so Git doesn’t keep sending the bad one (exact steps depend on whether you use libsecret, gnome-keyring, or plain store)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "## Practical paths forward"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "- **Stay on HTTPS:** Create/update a PAT, then on the next &#96;git push&#96; use **username = your GitHub username** and **password = the PAT**. Fix credential caching if it keeps reusing the old secret.  "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 59
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 29
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-04-14_05-03-57Z-code-push-authentication-issue.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.1562190055847168
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "**Check what is set:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "git config --global --get user.name"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "git config --global --get user.email"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "## GitHub “password”"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "GitHub does **not** use your account password for &#96;git push&#96; over HTTPS. You use a **Personal Access Token (PAT)** when Git asks for a password."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "You **do not** put the token in &#96;git config user.password&#96; (that is not a normal or safe pattern). Typical options:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "### Option A – type it when Git asks (simplest)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "cd /path/to/your/repo"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "git push origin main"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "When prompted:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "- **Username:** your GitHub username  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "- **Password:** paste your **PAT**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "If you use **&#96;credential.helper store&#96;** (as we set earlier), Git saves that pair in &#96;~/.git-credentials&#96; after the first successful push."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "### Option B – GitHub CLI (good UX)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "gh auth login"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "Follow the prompts (HTTPS, authenticate with browser or token)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "**Summary:** use &#96;git config&#96; for **name** and **email**; use a **PAT** (via prompt or &#96;gh auth login&#96;) for GitHub authentication, not a &#96;git config&#96; password field."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "_**User**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "give me command to see what in credential helper store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "**Explaining credential storage**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "I'm explaining how Git credential store works on Linux and warning about the security implications of viewing the credentials file. \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "With **&#96;credential.helper store&#96;**, Git keeps everything in a **plain-text file**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "cat ~/.git-credentials"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "That file usually has lines like &#96;https://username:TOKEN@github.com&#96; — **treat it as secret** (don’t paste it into chats or screenshots)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "**See only that the file exists and its size (no contents):**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "ls -la ~/.git-credentials"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "**See which hosts are stored without printing passwords** (tokens are still partially visible in some cases — use with care):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "grep -o 'https://[^@]*@' ~/.git-credentials | sed 's/:[^:]*@/@/'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "A simpler check is just whether GitHub is present:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 419
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 340
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-04-14_05-03-57Z-code-push-authentication-issue.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.15378570556640625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "Git will then save it (e.g. in &#96;~/.git-credentials&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "## Optional: store HTTPS credentials without a push (scripting)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "Replace placeholders with your **GitHub username** and **PAT** (keep this command off shared screens; it may end up in shell history):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "printf \"protocol=https\\nhost=github.com\\nusername=YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME\\npassword=YOUR_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN\\n\\n\" | git credential approve"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "Then lock down the store file:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "## If you are replacing an old token"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "Clear the old GitHub entry, then approve again or push again:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "printf \"protocol=https\\nhost=github.com\\n\\n\" | git credential reject"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "**Summary:** There is no &#96;git config&#96; for “GitHub password.” Use a **PAT** as the password, either at the **&#96;git push&#96;** prompt or via **&#96;git credential approve&#96;** as above."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 498
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 466
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-04-14_05-03-57Z-code-push-authentication-issue.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.15300479531288147

          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: git config --global --list 2\u003e/dev/null | head -40; echo \"---\"; git config --system --list 2\u003e/dev/null | grep -i credential || true\u003c/summary\u003e"

          {

            "text": "\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **run_terminal_command_v2**\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "\u003c/details\u003e\u003c/tool-use\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "\u003cthink\u003e\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eThought Process\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "**Configuring git credentials**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "I'm setting up global git credential storage to persist PATs after manual authentication. I'm using &#96;git config --global credential.helper store&#96; for persistent PAT storage. \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "Global Git config only had &#96;user.name&#96; and &#96;user.email&#96; — no credential helper. Configuring the credential helper and clearing any stale GitHub entry."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"shell\" data-tool-name=\"run_terminal_command_v2\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "\u003cdetails\u003e\u003csummary\u003eTool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: printf \"protocol=https\\nhost=github.com\\n\\n\" | git credential reject 2\u003e/dev/null || true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "git config --global credential.helper store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "git config --global --get credential.helper"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "printf \"protocol=https\\nhost=github.com\\n\\n\" | git credential fill 2\u003e\u00261 | head -5 || true\u003c/summary\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "printf \"protocol=https\\nhost=github.com\\n\\n\" | git credential reject 2\u003e/dev/null || true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "git config --global credential.helper store"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "git config --global --get credential.helper"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "printf \"protocol=https\\nhost=github.com\\n\\n\" | git credential fill 2\u003e\u00261 | head -5 || true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
